Incident Title: Office365: Brute Force - Login Attempts Same Source
Observation & Recommendation:
Observation: Multiple failed login attempts were detected from the same source targeting **Microsoft 365 accounts, indicating a potential brute force attack.

Remediation: Enable account lockout policies and multi-factor authentication (MFA), and block or investigate the suspicious source IP attempting repeated logins.

Incident Title: Safetica Sensitive Data Sent via Email
Observation & Recommendation:
Observation: Sensitive data was detected being sent via email by a user, as identified by Safetica, indicating a potential data leakage risk.

Remediation: Review the email activity, enforce DLP policies to restrict sharing of sensitive data, and provide user awareness on proper data handling practices.
